message:
feat: Hybrid Ghostty Metal + WebKit overlay architecture

- Add GhosttyTerminal wrapper for Ghostty C API
- Add GhosttyNSView with Metal rendering and input handling
- Add HybridContainerView with layer stack (Ghostty bottom, WebKit top)
- Implement hole punching for click passthrough to terminal
- WebKit overlay provides UI chrome (title bar, input panel)
- Ghostty provides GPU-accelerated terminal rendering

files.patch:
@@ -27,6 +27,10 @@ models/*.gguf
 
 # macOS
 .DS_Store
+Ghostty.app/
+
+# GhosttyKit framework (build from vendor/ghostty)
+app/Frameworks/
 
 # Debug
 *.dSYM/

@@ -12,13 +12,31 @@ let package = Package(
     targets: [
         .executableTarget(
             name: "ZellApp",
+            dependencies: ["GhosttyKit"],
             path: "ZellApp",
             resources: [
                 .copy("Resources/terminal.html")
             ],
             swiftSettings: [
                 .unsafeFlags(["-parse-as-library"])
+            ],
+            linkerSettings: [
+                .linkedFramework("Metal"),
+                .linkedFramework("MetalKit"),
+                .linkedFramework("QuartzCore"),
+                .linkedFramework("CoreText"),
+                .linkedFramework("UserNotifications"),
+                .linkedFramework("Carbon"),
+                .linkedFramework("Cocoa"),
+                .linkedFramework("IOKit"),
+                .linkedFramework("Security"),
+                .linkedLibrary("c++"),
+                .linkedLibrary("z")
             ]
+        ),
+        .binaryTarget(
+            name: "GhosttyKit",
+            path: "Frameworks/GhosttyKit.xcframework"
         )
     ]
 )
